questions.statement: Butter Paper is an example of ________ object.
options: More than one of the above /

questions.statement: <p>Find the power of a convex lens if the image formed is at a distance of 20 cm from the lens when the object is placed on the other side of the lens at 25 cm from the optical centre?</p>
options: More than one of the above<br /> /

questions.statement: Which of the following is suitable to be used as a shaving glass?
options: More than one of the above<br /> /

questions.statement: A photoelectric cell is a device which
options: converts electric energy into light energy /
More than one of the above /

questions.statement: The rearview mirrors of the vehicle should produce:
options: <span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">Diminished, virtual and erect image</span> /
